name: Withings
description: Withings provides health and wellness data from connected devices like smart scales, blood pressure monitors, sleep trackers, and activity watches. The API gives access to body measurements (weight, fat mass, muscle mass, bone mass, hydration), blood pressure readings, heart rate, ECG, sleep analysis, daily activity metrics, workout data, and device information.

capabilities.name: measure_getmeas
capabilities.description: Retrieve body measurements (weight, height, fat mass, muscle mass, bone mass, hydration, blood pressure, heart pulse, temperature, SpO2).

capabilities.name: measure_getactivity
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily activity data (steps, distance, calories, elevation, active duration, heart rate).

capabilities.name: measure_getworkouts
capabilities.description: Retrieve workout sessions with type, duration, distance, calories, and heart rate data.

capabilities.name: measure_getintradayactivity
capabilities.description: Retrieve high-resolution intraday activity data at minute-level granularity.

capabilities.name: sleep_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed sleep data with sleep stages, heart rate, and breathing disturbances.

capabilities.name: sleep_getsummary
capabilities.description: Retrieve sleep summary data including total duration, stages breakdown, and quality score.

capabilities.name: heart_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve ECG recordings and atrial fibrillation detection results.

capabilities.name: heart_list
capabilities.description: List available heart (ECG) recordings with signal data and classifications.

capabilities.name: user_getdevice
capabilities.description: List all Withings devices associated with the user account.

capabilities.name: user_getgoals
capabilities.description: Retrieve the user's health goals (weight, steps, sleep).

capabilities.name: notify_subscribe
capabilities.description: Subscribe to webhook notifications for data updates.
